title: Numbers (Givin)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Numbers}} {{Nickname}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image= |name=Numbers |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Givin/Legends|Givin]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] **[[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Hey, Numbers, how much does our side win?''"
"''Eighty-five credits among us. Twenty in your pocket.|Tenn Graneet and Numbers, prior to an arm-wrestling match|[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']]}} '''Numbers''' was the nickname of a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Givin/Legends|Givin]] who was conscripted by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] prior to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. In that [[Standard year/Legends|year]], he worked as a non-commissioned [[Officer/Legends|officer]] aboard the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial-class Star Destroyer]] [[Steel Talon/Legends|''Steel Talon'']]. As a member of a [[Species/Legends|species]] that excelled in mathematics, Numbers was able to perform complex calculations almost instantaneously. While in a non-commissioned officer's [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] one day, Numbers was witness to an [[Limb/Legends|arm]]-wrestling contest between [[Master chief petty officer]] [[Tenn Graneet]] and [[Olzal Erne]], the second-watch chief of the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer's]] starboard array. After various other denizens [[Gambling/Legends|placed bets]], Numbers was called on to inform Graneet's supporters of how many [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] they would pocket if Graneet won. He did win, and Numbers handed him his share of the spoils. ==Appearances== *[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Numbers }} [[Category:Givin]] [[Category:Imperial Navy enlisted personnel of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Males]]
